zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Thorne於1521年3月18日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯時，他的父親Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire16歲，母親Alice Maud21歲。他和Mary Purefoy至少有6個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1588年10月29日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Thorne于1521年3月18日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯时，他的父亲Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire16岁，母亲Alice Maud21岁。他和Mary Purefoy至少有6个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于1588年10月29日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Thorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

variants.name: Thorn
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thurn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Katharina, Milbert.

German: topographic name for someone who lived near a watchtower, or a metonymic occupational name for someone responsible for manning one, from Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the many places called with this word in the Rhineland, Bavaria, Austria, and Bohemia.
English (Warwickshire): variant of   Thorne  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Thorne was born on 18 March 1521, in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire, was 16 and his mother, Alice Maud, was 21. He had at least 6 sons and 7 daughters with Mary Purefoy. He died on 29 October 1588, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Thorne est né le 18 mars 1521, à Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Alice Maud, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles avec Mary Purefoy. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1588, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Thorne am 18. März 1521 in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire 16 und seine Mutter Alice Maud 21. Er hatte mit Mary Purefoy mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1588 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Thorne è nato il il 18 marzo 1521 nel Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Alice Maud, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie con Mary Purefoy. Morì il 29 ottobre 1588, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Thorneが1521年3月18日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヤードリー ハスティングズで生まれた時，父Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshireは16歳，母Alice Maudは21歳であった。彼はMary Purefoyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1588年10月29日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヤードリー ハスティングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Thorne(이)가 1521년 3월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 야어들리 하스틴그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Maud(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mary Purefoy(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1588년 10월 29일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 야어들리 하스틴그스에 묻혔다.

pt.18 March 1521–29 October 1588: 18 de março de 1521–29 de outubro de 1588
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Thorne nasceu em 18 de março de 1521, em Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Alice Maud, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas com Mary Purefoy. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1588, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Thorne родился 18 марта 1521 г. в местности ярдли хастингс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Maud, 21. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Mary Purefoy. Он умер 29 октября 1588 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ярдли хастингс, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.18 March 1521–29 October 1588: 18 de marzo de 1521–29 de octubre de 1588
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Thorne nació el 18 de marzo de 1521, en Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Richard Thornes, Sheriff of Shropshire, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Alice Maud, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas con Mary Purefoy. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1588, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
